message:
chore: clean up stale NTM session state, add session summary

Remove orphaned lock and PID files from completed NTM agent sessions
(am, cm agents). These files are runtime artifacts that persist after
the session processes exit and should not accumulate in the repo.

Add NTM session summary from 2026-04-06 session capturing the swarm
run output for archival.

- Remove .claude/scheduled_tasks.lock (stale scheduler lock)
- Remove .ntm/pids/am-*.pid, cm-*.pid (orphaned agent PID files)
- Add .ntm/summaries/automated_flywheel_setup_checker-20260406-*.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
